paragraphs.text: this reason is not so clear for you at present, but the overall concept should be. The details will become clear with time. For I propose that everything that is worthwhile comes out of the structure of man’s nature. It is necessary for us to live as God created us, and when someone does not live this way, I may confidently state that he does not live at all. I ask that you be satisfied with this for the time being.
